title: Feature - checking of modport directions in interfaces

features.name: interface modport input signal driven
features.description: Code should include an interface with a modport that defines a signal as input direction, and then have that input signal driven (assigned) from outside the interface
features.snippet:
interface bus_if(); logic [7:0] data; modport master(input data); endinterface
module top(); bus_if bus(); assign bus.data = 8'h42; endmodule
